name: 假死飲毒酒
description: 女主為了不成為太子登基的污點，主動端起毒酒準備自盡。太子衝進來阻止。這個場景的視覺張力在於酒杯接近嘴唇的慢動作感，和太子的絕望衝刺。
tags: 生死一線的緊迫感，觀眾明知是假死但仍然緊張

examples.drama_title: Girl Transmigrated as a Doomed Palace Maid...Modern Knowledge Turned Her Into the Prince’s Treasure
examples.excerpt: Zach was right. I am a coward who fears death. Ever since I arrived here, all I wanted was to live. But if only my passing can pave the way for his ascension to the throne, then I would rather drink this poisoned wine and leave him. ... Camelly, why are you so foolish? Aren't you the one who fears death the most?
examples.context: 生死一線的緊迫感，觀眾明知是假死但仍然緊張
